evals.prompt: Write walking-skeleton design for checkout-foundation — end-to-end slice, files shipped, out of scope for this epic.
evals.expected_output: work/checkout-foundation/design.md, 2–4 pages, cites solution.md, §4 lists deferred work, no task Gherkin.
assertions: Uses walking-skeleton sections (slice, files, gates, out of scope)
Cites solution.md by section rather than copying full architecture
No Feature:/Scenario: blocks (those belong in tasks.md)
